name: room in the castle
description: I'm in a room in the castle
hints: There is a cast iron pot here. It may be useful for mixing things.
GET POT - you may need it for mixing chemicals in the lab.
The pot can be used with chemicals from the lab (EAST). WEST returns to the animal heads room.
notes: Room with a cast iron pot useful for mixing chemicals. EAST leads to the lab (room 17). WEST returns to the animal heads room (room 5).
